name: Electric bikes (e-bikes)
summary: Consumer e-bikes $600-$8000, Class 1/2/3, pedal-assist and throttle.

evidence.claim: US e-bike Class 1 = pedal-assist to 20mph. Class 2 = throttle to 20mph. Class 3 = pedal-assist to 28mph. Class determines where the bike is legal to ride (trails, bike lanes, streets).
UL 2849 is the voluntary US safety certification for e-bike electrical systems; many e-bike fires have been traced to uncertified battery packs.

criteria.name: motor_watts
criteria.notes: 750W is the federal max; anything above isn't a consumer-class e-bike (E1).

criteria.name: ul_2849_certified
criteria.notes: Safety certification — fires are non-trivial risk with uncertified packs (E2).

confabulationPatterns.reality: Range claims are manufacturer-best-case: flat terrain, lightest rider, lowest assist level. Real-world range on hilly terrain at moderate assist is 40-60% of claimed (E1).
confabulationPatterns.checkPrompt: Is the range figure specified with assist level and terrain assumptions?

confabulationPatterns.reality: 750W is the FEDERAL CAP for consumer e-bikes, not a differentiator. Motor peak wattage matters less than torque (Nm) for hill-climbing.
confabulationPatterns.checkPrompt: Is peak wattage framed as premium? 750W is the regulatory max, not a feature.

confabulationPatterns.reality: Check for UL 2849 specifically. 'Safety tested in-house' or generic 'CE' marks don't match UL 2849's scope (E2).
confabulationPatterns.checkPrompt: Is the battery UL 2849 certified specifically?

counterfeitSignals.signal: E-bike below $500 from direct-from-China marketplace seller
counterfeitSignals.action: flag — likely uncertified battery, documented fire risk (E2)

compatibilityQuestions: Where will you ride? Class 3 not allowed on most multi-use paths.
Bike storage: indoor or outdoor? Uncertified batteries should NEVER be indoor-charged per NYC FDNY.

typicalHiddenCosts.name: Replacement battery (after 500-1000 charge cycles, typically 2-4 years)

repairability.notes: Bosch-motor bikes have strong parts support. Direct-from-China brands often have replace-whole-motor-assembly only.
